title: Monsieur Vincent
writer: Jean Bernard-Luc, Jean Anouilh, Maurice Cloche
actors: Pierre Fresnay, Aimé Clariond, Jean Debucourt
plot: St. Vincent de Paul struggles to bring about peace and harmony among peasants and nobles in the midst of the Black Death in Europe, carrying on his charitable work in the face of all obstacles.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award2 wins & 4 nominations total
